description: Agentic Mail Transfer Protocol node self-description. A foreign agent fetches this to learn how to speak to this node — no external docs required.

node.operator_pubkey: <hex Nostr pubkey of this node operator>

time.model: two-witness — created_at AND bitcoin block must agree
time.verify: created_at >= cited block timestamp AND created_at - block timestamp <= tolerance window; reject on disagreement
time.upper_bound: OpenTimestamps anchoring of event id (MAY, for obligations)

wallet_binding.native_required: own LUD-16 name@domain in operator's namespace, operator-controlled backend
wallet_binding.backend: operator choice — LSP / self-run node / custodial; liquidity sourcing is out of protocol scope
wallet_binding.foreign_addresses: MAY be supported only via wrapping behind an AMTP name@domain; never bound as native identity
wallet_binding.rule: the value-side namespace MUST NOT be subordinated to a foreign protocol's authority

provisioning.challenge: sha256(npub_hex + nonce) has N leading zero bits

identity_proof.key_side: signed kind-24403 identity claim with ['address','name@domain'] tag
identity_proof.valid_iff: domain nostr.json maps name->pubkey AND that pubkey signed a current claim to name@domain
